description_long: This bus shelter features a modern, rectangular design with a flat roof supported by a sturdy metal frame. The shelter's sides and back are constructed from horizontal wooden slats, providing partial enclosure while allowing visibility and airflow. A long wooden bench is integrated into the structure, offering seating for waiting passengers. One side of the shelter includes a vertical wooden element that may serve as a decorative accent or structural support. The roof is divided into three sections, likely made of translucent or dark-tinted material to provide shade while allowing some light through. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, combining metal and wood for both durability and visual appeal.
description: A modern bus shelter with a flat roof, horizontal wooden slats, and a built-in bench, combining metal and wood for a sleek, partially enclosed design.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the flat roof with three sections, the bench beneath, and the vertical wooden accent on one side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the open front, the bench, and the transparent or open side panels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full extent of the horizontal wooden slats and the vertical accent structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the open entry, the bench, and the supporting frame structure.
